title: math-research-pipelines: exact-arithmetic verification pipelines
description: Three machine-verified, exact-arithmetic mathematics pipelines (matrix-plates, lambda2c-emissiongap-verification, residual-return-verification), each re-deriving every load-bearing claim of its companion paper(s) in exact arithmetic so that no float crosses a decision boundary. Every claim is graded by epistemic status ([forced]/[computed]/[plausible]/[declared]/[open]) and pinned to a named, runnable test, so every number is reproducible rather than trusted from a rendered PDF. The companion papers and interactive tools are published at https://echo-s-studios.github.io/math-research-pipelines/.
